privileged_info_for_vlm: Target List ID is 8501. Expected fields: 1) 'policy_position' (Type: SELECT, Label: 'Policy Position', Options: SUPPORTS, OPPOSES, UNDECIDED, NO_RESPONSE). 2) 'staff_contact_name' (Type: TEXT, Label: 'Staff Contact Name', Size: 50). 3) 'followup_date' (Type: DATE, Label: 'Follow-up Date'). All fields must be active and the custom table must be created.
